title: cleome cornus-africani
intro: Cleome cornus-africani, also known as Spider Flower, is a tropical flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Cleome cornus-africani has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, offering health benefits like relieving congestion and soothing bronchial tubes. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
